title: mentha aquatica var. purpurea
intro: Mentha aquatica var. purpurea, commonly known as purple water mint, is a variety of the water mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers and fragrance. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding properties. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. purpurea include relief from indigestion, nausea, and headaches, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support digestive health and promote relaxation.
